growth_records.strain: MAG-based population (n=17 MAGs), not axenic culture
growth_records.medium: Freshwater reservoir water column (epilimnion), Římov Reservoir, Czech Republic
growth_records.cite: Kavagutti et al. High-resolution metagenomic reconstruction of the freshwater spring bloom. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-022-01451-4. [PMC9878933]
growth_records.snippet: Ca. Nanopelagicus (17) 106.72 ± 72.72 [CARD-FISH, Observed in situ, h]
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (106.72 ± 72.72 h) is the CARD-FISH 'Observed, in situ' value from Table 1. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/106.72 = 0.0065 h-1. Alternative metagenomic-based observed value (46.85 h), mortality-corrected estimates (56.06 h CARD-FISH; 28.94 h metagenomic), and gRodon estimate (9.21 h) also reported in the same table but not used here. Environmental population, not pure culture. [metadata completed from paper Methods: temperature]
